message:
feat(macros): add #[conformance] attribute for spec traceability

Add proc_macro_attribute for marking tests with specification coverage:

#[conformance(spec = "3.2.1", requirement = "Region close waits")]
#[test]
fn test_region_close() { ... }

Implementation:
- Parse spec and requirement string literal arguments
- Validation-only: checks arguments are present and correctly formatted
- Leaves item unchanged after validation (pure annotation)
- Custom arg parser handles comma separation and quoted strings
- Supports multiline requirement text

Error handling:
- Missing 'spec' or 'requirement' keys produce compile errors
- Unknown keys produce descriptive error messages
- Malformed string literals are rejected

This enables the conformance CLI to scan source files and build a
spec-to-test traceability matrix without runtime overhead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
